name: reverse-engineer
description: Claude Code plugin that reconstructs a design from a foreign/brownfield project: detect → understand (inventory, dependency map, research-augmented current-version cascade, inferred requirements) → recover-design → triage → emit (RECOVERED_DESIGN + schema-3.1 state + flat decisions) → handoff to project-architect. Research-augmented detection never trusts stale model training knowledge. Companion to project-architect via a shared schema-3.1 state contract.
